entries.headline: Your profile now shows up as a rich result in search.
entries.copy: Every paid profile now sends Google the full picture — your name, photo, role, verified X and Telegram, and website. Instead of a plain blue link, search results can show your avatar, your identity across platforms, and a one-line description of what you do. Applied automatically to every new profile as it's created.

entries.headline: Your profile can now show up in Google.
entries.copy: We fixed how we tell search engines about the site. Every paid operator profile, every ambassador campaign link, the /help page, and the updates feed are now listed for Google and other crawlers. When someone searches your handle or an ambassador campaign slug, your page can surface in the results — not just the LASTPROOF homepage.

entries.headline: Stuck? The new /help page walks you through it.
entries.copy: Profile creation, submitting proofs, updating your profile, and what each profile status means — all laid out with step-by-step walkthroughs, a searchable FAQ, and clear answers to the most common blockers. One place for anything you'd otherwise DM us about.

entries.headline: Every update we ship now lives at /status.
entries.copy: A new public page shows what we've shipped, what's new, and what's coming. Browse the last 10 updates on /status, or scroll the full archive at /status/all — grouped by month, going all the way back to launch.

entries.headline: Mobile wallet returns now resume where you left off.
entries.copy: Switching to your wallet app during a payment or proof no longer loses your spot. When you come back to LASTPROOF, you'll pick up exactly where you were — no restart, no re-entering details.

entries.headline: Ambassador referrals now track correctly from the very first sign-in.
entries.copy: If you were referred to LASTPROOF by a Terminal ambassador, your profile is linked to them the moment you land — no lost attribution, no missing credit.

entries.headline: Proof modal now checks your wallet's dev eligibility *before* you pay.
entries.copy: No more spending to find out you don't qualify. You'll see a clear yes/no up front, with the exact reason if it's a no.

entries.headline: Public profiles now show every proof, not just the first five.
entries.copy: Visitors can scroll through your full work history without clicking through. Longer careers, longer feeds — no artificial cap.

entries.headline: Work item dates save reliably when you enter just a month and year.
entries.copy: Editing a project with a date like "Mar 2026" no longer throws an error. Whether you enter a full date or month-only, it saves cleanly.

entries.headline: Treasury address copy button now works cleanly.
entries.copy: Copying the treasury address no longer picks up surrounding whitespace, and clicking COPY no longer highlights random page text.

entries.headline: Work items now sort by date automatically.
entries.copy: We removed the manual drag-to-reorder step — your proofs appear newest-first everywhere, on the dashboard and on your public profile. One less thing to manage.

entries.headline: Share your profile straight from the name bar.
entries.copy: The share icon moved from the topbar to sit right next to your @handle on the public profile, where visitors actually expect it.

entries.headline: Clearer helper text on the Pitch and About Me fields.
entries.copy: Reworded and brightened the hints on your dashboard so it's obvious what to put where.

entries.headline: Report inappropriate claims at reportclaims@lastshift.ai.
entries.copy: A dedicated inbox for flagging fake or misleading proofs on any profile.

entries.headline: New landing page: /earlyaccess.
entries.copy: A general-marketing destination for the platform, separate from the campaign and ambassador pages.

entries.headline: How It Works now explains Verify This Work.
entries.copy: A new third tab on /how-it-works walks you through the proof-verification flow — what verifiers see, how disputes work, and why the trust tier matters.

entries.headline: In-app browser warning banner.
entries.copy: Opening LASTPROOF inside Telegram, Instagram, or Twitter's in-app browser now shows a banner with a one-tap "copy link" — wallets don't work in those browsers, so we route you out cleanly.

entries.headline: Mint + Handle Change now use paste-to-verify — no wallet connect required.
entries.copy: The same frictionless flow that powers proofs now works for paying to mint and paying to change your @handle. Send the transaction from any wallet, paste the signature, done.

entries.headline: Modals share a consistent visual language.
entries.copy: The proof, mint, and handle-change modals now match the onboarding design — same spacing, same colors, same feel across every paid action.

entries.headline: Work item dates now display as "Mar 2026" instead of raw ISO strings.
entries.copy: Cleaner reading on public profiles, no more `2026-03-15T00:00:00Z` leaking through.

entries.headline: Work items now sort newest-first on public profiles.
entries.copy: Matches the dashboard order and the way most people read timelines.

entries.headline: Cleaner timezone picker.
entries.copy: We stripped city and country names — you'll see the UTC offset only, which is what actually matters.

entries.headline: Payment modals now cover the full screen on mobile.
entries.copy: No more dashboard bleeding through the corners of the modal on smaller devices.

entries.headline: Logo and wordmark in the topbar now link back to the homepage.
entries.copy: Click anywhere on the brand to go home, the way every other site works.

entries.headline: Dev verification now correctly checks the original mint authority.
entries.copy: The verify flow looks at your wallet's full history with the token, not just current holdings, so legitimate launch-wallet devs qualify reliably.

entries.headline: Site is discoverable: SEO, sitemap, social cards, and analytics.
entries.copy: Google can now index LASTPROOF properly, link previews on X and Telegram show a real card, and we can see which pages get traffic.

entries.headline: Token picker in the proof modal now shows token logos.
entries.copy: Faster to spot SOL vs USDT vs $LASTSHFT at a glance.

entries.headline: Live conversion rates on the payment screen.
entries.copy: The amount-to-send now updates in real time using live Raydium and Jupiter price feeds, so the number you paste into your wallet matches what your wallet will charge.

entries.headline: Tier progress bar now fills within the right segment.
entries.copy: The bar used to show progress toward the *final* tier — it now fills within your *current* tier, which is what people actually want to see.

entries.headline: Five smaller fixes across the profile and dashboard.
entries.copy:
- Comments now render correctly on public profiles
- Tier math edge cases cleaned up
- "Past projects" section displays correctly
- Animated dot indicators no longer jitter
- Dashboard proof counts fixed for paste-verified proofs

entries.headline: Work items capped at 6, proofs at 10 — with expand buttons.
entries.copy: Cleaner first view of any profile, with a one-click way to see everything.

entries.headline: Gold glow on the VERIFY THIS WORK button.
entries.copy: Makes it unmistakable where the action is on a public profile.

entries.headline: Profile automatically reloads after minting a proof.
entries.copy: "Back to Profile" now shows the fresh proof count and updated tier without a manual refresh.

entries.headline: Android wallet sign-in flow is more reliable.
entries.copy: Multiple rounds of fixes to mobile wallet authorization on Android — the handshake no longer hangs or races, and stale sessions get cleared automatically.

entries.headline: Payment confirmation screen no longer crashes on narrow terminals.
entries.copy: The animated terminal readout on Screen 5 is now safe against missing data and timing edge cases.

entries.headline: Proof Flow V3: paste-to-verify — no wallet connect required.
entries.copy: The biggest single improvement we've shipped. Send payment from any wallet, paste the transaction signature, and your proof verifies instantly via a webhook. No wallet connect, no 60-second wait, no mobile wallet headaches.

entries.headline: Subscription cron no longer accidentally downgrades Early Access profiles.
entries.copy: First-5000 profiles stay First-5000 until you choose otherwise.

entries.headline: HIRE button falls back to your verified Telegram handle.
entries.copy: If a visitor clicks HIRE and you haven't set X, we point them to your Telegram instead of leaving them stuck.

entries.headline: Ambassador landing pages.
entries.copy: Dedicated pages for Terminal ambassadors to share with their audience, with stats and attribution built in.

entries.headline: Tier badge colors now match the tier everywhere.
entries.copy: Silver for TIER 1 · NEW, bronze for TIER 2 · VERIFIED, gold for TIER 3 · EXPERIENCED, purple for TIER 4 · LEGEND. Consistent across public profiles, dashboard, and Trust Tier cards.

entries.headline: Links tabs now filter by platform.
entries.copy: Click the X or Telegram tab on your profile's Links section and you'll see only the links for that platform.

entries.headline: Six smaller fixes in one pass.
entries.copy:
- Paste into Previously Known As no longer strips whitespace
- Pinning links shows a clear visual confirmation
- Clicking a pinned link works in all contexts
- Screenshot thumbnails load reliably
- Work item dates parse correctly
- Handle history shows the full trail

entries.headline: First-5000 profiles auto-publish on campaign claim.
entries.copy: Claim a 5K slot and your profile goes live immediately — no extra publish step.

entries.headline: Telegram login now uses the official Login Widget.
entries.copy: Cleaner sign-in flow that works reliably on mobile, including inside in-app browsers where the old popup broke.

entries.headline: Phantom wallet now works on Android.
entries.copy: Android users can connect their Phantom wallet and mint proofs end-to-end. Full mobile wallet adapter integration with a guided 9-screen flow.

entries.headline: SHIFTBOT can now rewrite your Pitch and About Me fields.
entries.copy: Click the SHIFTBOT button on any long-form field to get an AI-polished version, instantly. Keep the tone, fix the structure.

entries.headline: Screenshot gallery with lightbox view.
entries.copy: Upload up to six screenshots per work item — visitors can click any thumbnail to view it full-size without leaving your profile.

entries.headline: Profile view counter.
entries.copy: Your dashboard now shows how many times your public profile has been viewed, counted fresh on every page load.

entries.headline: LASTPROOF is live.
entries.copy:
The first shippable build. What's in it:
- Public profiles with the tier system (TIER 1 NEW → TIER 4 LEGEND) based on on-chain minted proofs
- The FIRST 5,000 campaign — claim a free premium slot while supply lasts, with a live counter and badge
- Onboarding flow: claim a handle, add your first proofs, publish
- Dashboard: identity, pitch, about me, work items, screenshots, links, categories
- Proof verification modal (first version)
- 16 supported languages including Tagalog, Hindi, Indonesian, and Thai
- Wallet connect, X and Telegram authentication
- Subscription at $10 / 30 days, handle changes at $100 USD
- **Pay in $LASTSHFT for 40% off every paid action** — subscription, handle change, mint, proof. Discount wired through the entire payment pipeline from day one.
